title: Analytics - Support Device Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when Support > Device screen is opened in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the mobile device.
Tap on the Support option from the Home screen or menu.
Tap on the Device screen within the Support section.
Observe the analytics event being logged.
expected: An analytics event is logged when the Support > Device screen is opened. The event tracks usage analytics including event count by country, gender, app version, app build, and app environment.
